items.name: $7 BEERS & SIDELINE SHAREABLES EVERY GAME DAY AT BP
items.description: Football at BP just got better! Catch the game with us and enjoy great deals on food, drinks and the chance to win weekly prizes.
items.simplified_description: Enjoy $7 beers and shareable snacks during every game day at Boston Pizza.

items.name: $1 WINGS DURING MONTREAL GAMES
items.description: If you're a fan of wings and love cheering on Montreal, we've got an unbeatable deal for you! Enjoy wings for just $1 each during every Montreal game this season.
items.simplified_description: Get chicken wings for $1 each during Montreal games this season.

items.name: THE BEST HOUR OF THE DAY IS HERE
items.description: It's time for BP's Appy Hour! Dive into our mouthwatering selection of apps and shareables, paired perfectly with your favourite drink starting at only $5. Just check with your BP for more information about your local Appy Hour!
items.simplified_description: Enjoy discounted appetizers and drinks during BP's Appy Hour.

items.name: SPECIALS EVERY DAY OF THE WEEK AT BOSTON PIZZA
items.description: Pizza Monday. Pasta Tuesday. Wing Wednesday. No matter what day you stop by, Boston Pizza’s got a Daily Special with your name on it. Every single day!
items.simplified_description: Daily specials on pizza, pasta, and wings every day of the week.

items.name: DAILY SPECIALS AT BOSTON PIZZA
items.description: Pizza. Pasta. Wings. No matter what day you stop by, Boston Pizza’s got a Daily Special with your name on it!
items.simplified_description: Daily specials on pizza, pasta, and wings available every day.

items.name: MEAL DEALS STARTING AT $19.99
items.description: Need to satisfy everyone's cravings? We've got Meal Deals for the entire crew!
items.simplified_description: Meal deals designed to satisfy groups, starting at $19.99.

items.name: GET 50% OFF YOUR SECOND PIZZA
items.description: Buy any medium or large pizza and get your second medium or large for half the price!
items.simplified_description: Buy one medium or large pizza, get the second at half price.

items.name: PASTA TUESDAY STARTING AT $11.99
items.description: Get one of our gourmet pasta dishes or create your own masterpiece for as low as $11.99.
items.simplified_description: Enjoy gourmet or custom pasta dishes starting at $11.99 on Tuesdays.
